stemHtml: During what period shall the commander be satisfied that each passenger on board is seated and his/her safety belt or restraint system is properly secured?

options.a: Before take-off and landing, and whenever deemed necessary in the interest of safety.
options.b: Before take-off and landing, during taxiing, and whenever deemed necessary in the interest of safety.
options.d: Once seated and for the entire duration of the flight, unless otherwise stated.
